title: Magazine Cover
sourceTitle: Create Premium Magazine Cover Portrait As Ultra

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a premium magazine-cover portrait as an ultra-tight beauty close-up of an elegant Asian woman with a calm yet commanding gaze. Let her face fill nearly the entire frame, with a slightly tension-filled crop that draws attention straight to the eyes, skin texture, and subtle facial detail. Keep the skin highly realistic with visible pores, soft natural luminosity, crisp catchlights in the eyes, and understated glossy lips. Use cinematic beauty lighting with a diffused key light, carefully controlled highlights, and gentle shadow transitions. Keep the setting dark and minimal, built around a black-and-gold luxury mood. Styling should stay refined and restrained, with polished high-fashion makeup, macro-lens intimacy, shallow depth of field, a glossy editorial finish, ultra high resolution, and a vertical 9:16 composition.
